class.name: AbilitySystemCueAnimation
class.description:
[AbilitySystemCueAnimation] is a specialized cue that automatically plays animations when triggered. It works with [AnimationPlayer], [AnimatedSprite2D], and [AnimatedSprite3D] nodes provided to the [AbilitySystemComponent].
Create a .tres resource of this type, set the [member animation_name] property, and add it to your [AbilitySystemAbility]'s [member AbilitySystemAbility.cues] list. When the ability is activated, the animation will play on the target node.
[b]Example:[/b] [codeblock] # Create hit_animation.tres (AbilitySystemCueAnimation) # cue_tag: "hit_animation" # animation_name: "hit" # event_type: OnExecute [/codeblock]

members.member: Name of the animation to play. The cue will look for a node with the alias [member AbilitySystemCue.node_name] in the component's registry. If no name is specified, the component will try its default animation nodes.
